name: True North Copper Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.4600, stop A$0.3614, target A$0.5100 (0.51:1) — then trail it.
